location: Rare drop from the blue-robed Dominula Dancers (Celebrants) found east of the Windmill Village Site of Grace, in Dominula on the Altus Plateau.
tactics: Only about a 0.5% drop chance — farm the pair of dancers just east of the Windmill Village grace, resting and re-engaging.
Don't wade into the whole festival crowd at once — Dominula has more dancers plus tougher patrolling enemies; isolate the two nearest the grace.
Its skill ignores half of a blocking enemy's damage negation, making it especially good against shield-turtling NPCs and invaders.
lore: A sickle decorated with flowers and colored fabric, used as a ceremonial dance prop during Dominula's festivals — carved from human bone despite its decorative appearance.

builds.name: Pure Dex poke
builds.why: Near S-tier Dexterity scaling with a Keen affinity and low stat requirements make it one of the strongest early-to-mid pure-dex daggers.

builds.name: Anti-block invader tool
builds.why: Its 50% guard-negation-ignore passive rewards using it specifically against blocking enemies and shield-heavy PvP opponents.
